name: akb-wiki
description: LLM-wiki layer for AKB vaults — unified document ingest (any source) and hybrid search.

interface.shortDescription: LLM-wiki ingest and search layer for AKB vaults.
interface.longDescription:
Runs any AKB vault as an LLM-wiki. Combines a read-only question-answering
surface (`/akb-query`: multi-strategy search, cited synthesis, a time-axis
freshness check) and a single unified ingest entry point:
`/akb-ingest` takes whatever you point at — a local file, a web URL, a GitHub
PR / release / commit, a Confluence page, or a Jira issue — classifies the
source type, and dispatches to a specialized ingest subagent. Document-style
sources become five-section LLM-wiki summary pages (optionally preserving the
original bytes); decision-record sources (PRs, releases, commits, issues)
become faithful mechanical episodic records. The router fetches nothing
itself; each subagent owns exactly one fetch path. Cross-source consolidation,
lint, and dream-cycle maintenance are handled by an external maintenance layer
that runs over the same AKB vault, not by this skillpack.
defaultPrompt: Ingest this PDF into my vault.
Ingest this GitHub PR into my vault.
Ask my vault about this topic.
